song.title: Take Me In
song.lyrics:
[V1] . Em Cmaj7 Take me past the outer courts, |and through the Holy Place .D Em D Past the brazen altar, Lord, |I want to see Your face. . Em Pass me by the crowds of people, . Cmaj7 The priests who sing Your praise. . D I hunger and thirst for Your righteousness, . Am7 D And it's only found in one place.
[C] . Em D/E Take me in to the Holy of Holies. . Am7 C/D Em D Take me in by the blood of the Lamb. . Em D/E Take me in to the Holy of Holies. . Am7 D Em (Cmaj7 D Em D) Take the coal, cleanse my lips, here I am.
